sbas_displacement_raw.description: Raw cumulative LOS displacement from SBAS, per date. Same reference convention as pygmtsar output.

sbas_displacement_masked.description: sbas_displacement_raw with low-coherence samples set to NaN. Same reference convention.

sbas_displacement_segmented_same_pixel.description: DERIVED visualization product: each continuous valid temporal run at the same spatial pixel is re-referenced to zero at its first valid sample. NOT the scientific SBAS output.

sbas_velocity_raw.description: LOS velocity from SBAS (linear fit through cumulative displacement).

sbas_velocity_masked.description: sbas_velocity_raw with low-coherence pixels (static mask) set to NaN.

sbas_rmse_raw.description: SBAS LSQ residual RMSE per pixel.

sbas_rmse_masked.description: sbas_rmse_raw with low-coherence pixels (static mask) set to NaN.

sbas_valid_time_mask.description: Per-sample mask (1=valid, 0=invalid). Dynamic if available, else static valid_pixel_mask broadcast over time.

sbas_segment_id.description: Integer segment id (0=invalid, 1,2,3,... = continuous valid temporal runs for the same spatial pixel).

coherence_mean.description: Mean of multilook coherence across all SBAS pairs.

coherence_median.description: Median of multilook coherence across all SBAS pairs (robust to outlier pairs).

coherence_per_date.description: Mean coherence of pairs that include each acquisition date. Per-date proxy (true coherence is between two dates).

coherence_stack.description: Per-pair multilook coherence stack (shape: pair, lat, lon).

dem.description: Copernicus GLO-30 DEM, ellipsoidal, interpolated to product grid.

loader_example_netcdf:
import xarray as xr
ds = xr.open_dataset('outputs/project_D/results_tight.nc')
vel    = ds.sbas_velocity_raw            # mm/year
vel_m  = ds.sbas_velocity_masked         # mm/year, low-coh pixels = NaN
raw_ts = ds.sbas_displacement_raw.sel(lat=-20.12, lon=-44.12, method='nearest')
msk_ts = ds.sbas_displacement_masked.sel(lat=-20.12, lon=-44.12, method='nearest')
seg_ts = ds.sbas_displacement_segmented_same_pixel.sel(lat=-20.12, lon=-44.12, method='nearest')
loader_example_npz:
import numpy as np, json
npz  = np.load('outputs/project_D/sbas_results_masked.npz', allow_pickle=True)
meta = json.loads(str(npz['metadata_json']))
vel  = npz['sbas_velocity_raw']                       # (lat, lon)
disp = npz['sbas_displacement_raw']                   # (date, lat, lon)
mask = npz['sbas_valid_time_mask'].astype(bool)       # (date, lat, lon)
seg  = npz['sbas_displacement_segmented_same_pixel']  # (date, lat, lon)
sid  = npz['sbas_segment_id']                         # (date, lat, lon)
lat, lon, dates = npz['lat'], npz['lon'], npz['dates']
